If you’ll require Kindred to commence, i.e., “sponsor,” an immigration or work permit case in order to employ you, either now or at some point in the near future, then you should answer yes. An example of an immigration or work permit case that may require sponsorship now or in the future would be an H-1B or other employment-based work permit sponsorship.

Links

Additional Information

Diversity Survey

This optional survey helps us evaluate our diversity and inclusion efforts. Participation is voluntary and refusal to submit the survey will not affect your job application. The answers to these questions are not seen on an individualized basis and your submission will only be used to assess our diversity and inclusion efforts.
